deploy.startCommand: echo '=== STARTING API ===' && echo '--- pwd ---' && pwd && echo '--- ls -la ---' && ls -la && echo '--- ls dist ---' && ls -la dist/ 2>&1 && echo '--- node version ---' && node --version && echo '--- env check ---' && echo "DATABASE_URL set: $(if [ -z "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then echo NO; else echo YES; fi)" && echo '=== EXECUTING INDEX.JS ===' && node dist/index.js 2>&1
